notes: v2.5.1 - Workforce Planner: a complete overhaul. Set team capacity, compare upcoming project demand against available hours, and level workload across people instead of guessing. Switch between calendar, demand, and color-coded heatmap views; smooth out overloaded stretches with automatic leveling and have downstream dates cascade when you reschedule. Company holidays and individual availability are factored into capacity, attach cost to capacity to see the labor picture, and plans pull from build-schedule dates with a clear banner flagging projects that still need dates. CATIA: a hardened pipeline that is far less likely to wedge or fail silently, automatic reconciliation that catches and corrects drift, and a background supervisor that clears stuck states with fewer manual restarts. Bill of Materials: adding a part number that already exists is now blocked up front, and reordering BOM lines renumbers the sequence cleanly. Identity: improved name lookups so people resolve to the right record across the app.
